h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

section.small: estimation from 776kb of code in 1065 edited files across 622 commits

section.div: A native Kubernetes desktop client — nothing in your cluster. Helm, Argo CD, Flux CD, Gateway API & cert-manager built in. MIT-licensed.

Kubernetes operator for self-hosted LLM inference across a heterogeneous GPU fleet: NVIDIA CUDA, AMD Vulkan, and Apple Silicon Metal. Runtimes: llama.cpp, vLLM, TGI, mlx-server. Multi-GPU sharding, model caching, OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Apache-2.0, run across homelab and on-prem fleets, actively developed.
Get started using GitHub in less than an hour.

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
